jtbds.title: Originate a commercial or consumer loan
jtbds.situation: applicant requests credit; loan officer must collect application, order credit reports, underwrite risk, obtain approvals, and fund disbursement
jtbds.motivation: book quality loans within target yield while meeting fair lending obligations and closing before competitor
jtbds.outcome: loan approved, documented, and funded; adverse action notice sent if declined
success_criteria: credit decision rendered within 3 business days of complete application
adverse action notice sent within 30 days of denial
TILA disclosures delivered before consummation
HMDA data captured for reportable loans

jtbds.title: Process and authorize wire transfer
jtbds.situation: customer or internal desk initiates a wire transfer; specialist must verify authentication, screen against sanctions, obtain dual approval, and execute settlement
jtbds.motivation: process transfers accurately within Fedwire/SWIFT deadlines while preventing fraud and sanctions violations
jtbds.outcome: wire executed and confirmed, SWIFT/Fedwire confirmation archived, correspondent credited
success_criteria: OFAC/SDN screening completed before execution
dual approval obtained for wires above threshold
Fedwire submitted before 5:00 PM ET cutoff
SWIFT MT103 confirmation archived within 2 hours

jtbds.title: Onboard a business banking customer (KYB/KYC)
jtbds.situation: business applies for banking relationship; analyst must verify business identity, collect beneficial ownership, assess risk, and open accounts
jtbds.motivation: establish profitable banking relationship while meeting BSA/AML CDD/EDD requirements and preventing financial crime
jtbds.outcome: customer onboarded with CDD file complete, risk rating assigned, accounts opened
success_criteria: beneficial ownership at >= 25% threshold collected and verified
OFAC and adverse media screening cleared
CDD risk rating assigned within 5 business days
FinCEN CDD Rule certification on file
EDD initiated for high-risk customers

jtbds.title: Handle customer payment dispute
jtbds.situation: customer disputes a transaction (card, ACH, wire); analyst must investigate, determine validity, apply provisional credit, and resolve within Reg E/Z timeframes
jtbds.motivation: resolve disputes fairly within statutory deadlines to avoid regulatory penalties and preserve customer trust
jtbds.outcome: dispute resolved, final credit or debit posted, chargeback filed with network if warranted, Reg E/Z notice sent
success_criteria: provisional credit applied within 5 business days for Reg E (10 for new accounts)
investigation completed within 45 business days
final determination letter sent within 3 business days of resolution
chargeback filed within network time limits

jtbds.title: Manage overdraft authorization and fee assessment
jtbds.situation: customer account balance would go negative; system must apply overdraft policy, optionally transfer from linked account, assess fee, and notify customer
jtbds.motivation: maximize fee revenue within opt-in rules while preventing regulatory action for unauthorized overdraft fees
jtbds.outcome: transaction approved or declined per policy, fee assessed if applicable, customer notified, opt-in status confirmed
success_criteria: opt-in status verified before assessing ATM/one-time debit overdraft fee
continuous overdraft fee disclosed in advance per Reg E
daily fee cap applied per account agreement
linked account sweep attempted before overdraft

jtbds.title: Process account closure
jtbds.situation: customer requests account closure or bank initiates for-cause closure; specialist must resolve open items, issue remaining balance, and complete reporting
jtbds.motivation: close account cleanly without residual liability, meet dormancy/escheatment rules, and preserve the customer relationship if possible
jtbds.outcome: account closed, balance disbursed, 1099-INT issued if applicable, dormancy review completed
success_criteria: balance disbursed within 5 business days of closure
all recurring transactions cancelled before closure date
dormancy review and unclaimed property report filed if applicable
1099-INT prepared for interest-bearing accounts

jtbds.title: Investigate AML transaction monitoring alert
jtbds.situation: transaction monitoring system generates an AML alert; analyst must review, gather evidence, determine true positive or dismiss, and escalate to SAR if warranted
jtbds.motivation: identify and report suspicious activity to FinCEN while minimizing false positive burden
jtbds.outcome: alert closed as false positive with documentation, or SAR filing initiated with 30-day completion
success_criteria: alert reviewed within 5 business days of generation
true positive escalated to BSA officer within 24 hours
SAR filed within 30 days of determination
documentation of disposition retained for 5 years

jtbds.title: Originate trade finance transaction (LC/BG)
jtbds.situation: corporate customer requests issuance of letter of credit or bank guarantee to support an import/export transaction; specialist must assess credit, draft instrument, and issue via SWIFT
jtbds.motivation: support customer trade activity, earn fee income, and limit bank exposure within credit appetite
jtbds.outcome: LC or BG issued via SWIFT MT700/MT760, collateral booked, customer charged fees
success_criteria: OFAC and sanctions screening on all parties before issuance
credit limit verified before issuance
UCP 600 / URDG 758 terms applied correctly
SWIFT message authenticated and sent within 2 business days of approval

jtbds.title: Settle treasury/investment security transaction
jtbds.situation: treasury desk trades a security (T-bill, repo, swap); analyst must confirm trade details, ensure pre-settlement funding, and settle via DTC/Fedwire Securities on value date
jtbds.motivation: achieve clean settlement to avoid fails charges, maintain liquidity ratios, and earn positive carry
jtbds.outcome: security delivered-vs-payment settled, confirmation archived, position updated in treasury system
success_criteria: trade confirmed with counterparty before T+1 noon
funding verified in nostro before settlement cutoff
DTC/Fedwire settlement confirmed on value date
FRTB risk data captured by EOD

jtbds.title: File Suspicious Activity Report (SAR)
jtbds.situation: AML investigation concludes suspicious activity; BSA officer must prepare, review, and electronically file SAR with FinCEN within mandatory timeframes
jtbds.motivation: fulfill legal reporting obligation, protect bank from criminal liability, and contribute to law enforcement investigations
jtbds.outcome: SAR filed on FinCEN BSA E-Filing system, confirmation archived, subject file updated without tipping off
success_criteria: SAR filed within 30 days of initial suspicious activity determination (60 if suspect unknown)
narrative meets FinCEN 'five Ws' standard
continuation SAR filed if activity continues beyond 90 days
SAR and supporting documentation retained for 5 years
subject account not tipped off about filing

jtbds.title: Originate residential mortgage loan
jtbds.situation: retail borrower applies for home purchase or refinance; LO must take application, run credit, collect docs, order appraisal, underwrite to GSE guidelines, satisfy conditions, and fund within RESPA timeline
jtbds.motivation: close the loan within rate-lock period and RESPA/TRID disclosure deadlines
jtbds.outcome: loan closed and funded; HMDA data collected; loan sold or retained
success_criteria: Loan Estimate delivered within 3 business days of application
appraisal ordered within 3 days
closing disclosure delivered 3 business days before closing
HMDA data collected at origination

jtbds.title: Conduct annual credit facility review
jtbds.situation: commercial credit facility requires annual review: financial statement spreading, covenant testing, risk rating update, and credit committee memo before maturity or annual renewal
jtbds.motivation: detect credit deterioration early and maintain accurate risk ratings for capital adequacy
jtbds.outcome: credit committee memo approved; risk rating updated; renewal executed or workout initiated
success_criteria: financial statements spread within 30 days of receipt
covenant compliance tested
risk rating updated in LOS
credit committee memo approved

jtbds.title: Process check fraud claim
jtbds.situation: customer reports counterfeit or altered check; bank must freeze funds, conduct investigation under UCC Article 3, determine liability, and initiate recovery
jtbds.motivation: recover funds and resolve liability under UCC within Reg E and UCC timeframes
jtbds.outcome: fraud determined; funds recovered or loss taken; UCC claim filed if applicable
success_criteria: funds frozen within 1 business day
investigation completed within 10 business days
UCC claim filed if bank error
customer notified of outcome

jtbds.title: Onboard retail deposit customer
jtbds.situation: individual opens checking or savings account; banker must verify identity under CIP, screen against OFAC/PEP lists, collect beneficial ownership if business, and activate account in core banking system
jtbds.motivation: open account compliantly within session while preventing identity fraud
jtbds.outcome: account opened; CIP documentation filed; online banking activated
success_criteria: identity verified through government-issued ID
OFAC and PEP screening completed
account opened in core system
online banking credentials issued

jtbds.title: Perfect and manage loan collateral
jtbds.situation: commercial loan secured by real estate, equipment, or receivables requires UCC filing, deed of trust recording, lien search, and ongoing perfection monitoring
jtbds.motivation: maintain first-priority lien position throughout loan term to protect collateral value
jtbds.outcome: UCC filed; lien recorded; collateral file complete; monitoring schedule set
success_criteria: UCC-1 filed within 5 days of closing
deed of trust recorded within 10 days
lien search updated
insurance certificate on file and monitored

jtbds.title: Process ACH return and exception
jtbds.situation: ACH item returned by RDFI or originated item disputed; must be processed within NACHA timeframes, ODFI notified, customer debited or credited, and exception logged
jtbds.motivation: resolve ACH exceptions within NACHA return windows to preserve settlement rights
jtbds.outcome: return processed within NACHA deadline; customer account adjusted; exception documented
success_criteria: return processed within NACHA return window
customer account credited or debited
ODFI notification sent
exception logged in ACH system

jtbds.title: Conduct BSA Customer Due Diligence review
jtbds.situation: existing customer triggers periodic or event-driven CDD refresh: updated beneficial ownership, source of funds, transaction profile review, and risk rating update
jtbds.motivation: maintain current CDD and detect changes in customer risk profile before examiner review
jtbds.outcome: CDD refreshed; risk rating updated; EDD initiated if elevated; documentation filed
success_criteria: CDD review completed within policy timeframe
beneficial ownership updated
risk rating updated in system
EDD initiated for elevated-risk customers

jtbds.title: Process cross-border payment (SWIFT/SEPA)
jtbds.situation: corporate customer initiates cross-border payment; specialist must OFAC screen beneficiary and intermediary banks, select correspondent route, generate SWIFT MT103/MX pacs.008, and reconcile nostro account
jtbds.motivation: execute payment on value date while meeting OFAC screening and correspondent banking requirements
jtbds.outcome: payment settled on value date; SWIFT confirmation received; nostro reconciled
success_criteria: OFAC screening completed before release
SWIFT message generated correctly
payment settled on value date
nostro reconciled within T+1

jtbds.title: Manage regulatory examination response
jtbds.situation: OCC or Fed examiner requests documents, transaction samples, and policies for examination; bank must triage requests, gather materials, brief management, and submit response packages within examiner deadlines
jtbds.motivation: demonstrate strong compliance culture and minimize examination findings
jtbds.outcome: all examiner requests responded to on time; findings documented; MRA action plan submitted
success_criteria: initial document production within examiner deadline
examiner meeting briefings prepared
draft findings reviewed by legal
MRA response plan approved by board

jtbds.title: Issue and manage commercial letter of credit
jtbds.situation: corporate customer requests LC for international trade; bank must review application, credit-approve, issue LC via SWIFT MT700, manage document presentation under UCP600, and effect payment
jtbds.motivation: support customer trade without taking unauthorized credit risk; comply with UCP600
jtbds.outcome: LC issued; documents examined; payment effected on compliant presentation
success_criteria: LC issued within 2 business days of credit approval
documents examined within 5 banking days
compliant presentation paid on due date
non-compliant presentation discrepancies communicated

jtbds.title: Manage interest rate risk (IRRBB)
jtbds.situation: quarterly ALCO requires IRR report: NII sensitivity simulation, EVE shock analysis, and comparison to internal policy limits and regulatory guidance
jtbds.motivation: ensure NII and EVE exposures are within board-approved risk appetite
jtbds.outcome: ALCO report presented; limit breaches escalated; hedging action taken if required
success_criteria: NII sensitivity modeled for at least 6 rate scenarios
EVE shock analysis completed
results compared to policy limits
ALCO presentation prepared and delivered

jtbds.title: Handle deceased customer estate settlement
jtbds.situation: customer dies leaving deposit accounts, safe deposit box, and/or loans; bank must verify death, identify legal representative, inventory assets, process estate transfers or payoffs, and close accounts per state escheatment rules
jtbds.motivation: settle estate account efficiently while complying with state probate and escheatment requirements
jtbds.outcome: estate settled; funds transferred to legal representative or escheated; accounts closed
success_criteria: death verified within 5 days
legal representative identified
assets inventoried
funds transferred or escheated within state timeframe

jtbds.title: Conduct fair lending self-assessment
jtbds.situation: annual ECOA/FHA compliance review: disparate treatment analysis of loan decisions, pricing analysis by protected class, redlining screen for CRA assessment areas, and HMDA data integrity check
jtbds.motivation: detect fair lending risk before examination and demonstrate proactive compliance
jtbds.outcome: analysis completed; findings documented; corrective actions initiated; management report filed
success_criteria: disparate treatment analysis completed for all loan products
pricing analysis by protected class completed
redlining screen for all CRA assessment areas
HMDA data validated and corrected

jtbds.title: Process SBA-guaranteed loan
jtbds.situation: small business applies for SBA 7(a) or 504 loan; LO must submit application to SBA ETRAN, meet SBA eligibility rules, obtain SBA authorization, close under SBA SOP requirements, and disburse
jtbds.motivation: provide guaranteed financing to small business while meeting SBA program requirements
jtbds.outcome: SBA authorization issued; loan closed per SOP; funds disbursed; SBA loan number assigned
success_criteria: SBA eligibility verified
ETRAN submission complete
SBA authorization received
loan closed per current SOP
disbursement reported to SBA

jtbds.title: Manage dormant account and unclaimed property
jtbds.situation: accounts with no owner-generated activity for state-mandated dormancy period must be escheated; coordinator must identify dormant accounts, send required notices, report to state, and remit funds
jtbds.motivation: comply with state unclaimed property laws and avoid regulatory penalty
jtbds.outcome: dormant accounts identified; notices sent; state report filed; funds remitted
success_criteria: dormant accounts identified per state dormancy period
due diligence notices sent
state unclaimed property report filed on time
funds remitted to state by deadline

jtbds.title: Process loan modification or forbearance
jtbds.situation: distressed borrower requests loan modification, forbearance, or short sale approval; specialist must evaluate financial hardship, underwrite modification terms, obtain investor approval, execute modification agreement
jtbds.motivation: prevent avoidable foreclosure while recovering maximum NPV for investor
jtbds.outcome: modification approved and executed; trial period started; terms documented
success_criteria: hardship verified with documentation
NPV analysis completed
investor approval obtained
modification agreement executed
trial period payments tracked

jtbds.title: Manage operational risk loss event
jtbds.situation: material operational loss event triggers OR event logging, root cause analysis, loss quantification, regulatory notification if threshold exceeded, and corrective action tracking
jtbds.motivation: capture OR losses accurately for regulatory capital modeling and prevent recurrence
jtbds.outcome: OR event logged; root cause identified; regulatory notification filed if required; corrective action implemented
success_criteria: OR event logged within 3 days of discovery
root cause analysis completed within 30 days
regulatory notification filed if threshold exceeded
corrective action plan implemented

jtbds.title: Conduct regulatory stress test (DFAST/CCAR)
jtbds.situation: annual DFAST submission requires designing severely adverse macro scenarios, running credit loss models across loan portfolios, projecting NII and expenses, and submitting results to OCC/Fed
jtbds.motivation: demonstrate capital adequacy under stressed conditions and meet regulatory submission deadline
jtbds.outcome: DFAST results submitted on time; capital ratios under all scenarios above minimums
success_criteria: all scenarios modeled per regulatory guidance
credit loss models run for all portfolios
capital ratios calculated for all 9 quarters
submission completed on or before deadline

jtbds.title: Issue and manage credit card account
jtbds.situation: approved credit card applicant must receive a card, activate it, set initial credit limit, and be enrolled in rewards program; ongoing management includes limit increases and delinquency management
jtbds.motivation: activate card-holder quickly to capture interchange revenue and deepen customer relationship
jtbds.outcome: card issued and activated; credit limit set; rewards enrolled; first statement generated
success_criteria: card mailed within 5 business days of approval
activation enabled via phone or online
credit limit set per underwriting
rewards program enrolled
first statement generated on cycle date

jtbds.title: Manage LIBOR-to-SOFR loan transition
jtbds.situation: legacy floating-rate loans referencing LIBOR must be amended to SOFR-based fallback rates; operations must identify affected loans, prepare amendment letters, obtain customer consent, and update core system rate indices
jtbds.motivation: complete IBOR transition before contractual fallback trigger while minimizing customer friction
jtbds.outcome: all affected loans amended; customer consents obtained; system rate indices updated
success_criteria: all LIBOR-referencing loans identified
amendment letters sent to all borrowers
customer consent rate tracked
core system indices updated before transition date
